description: Public parliamentary stream and source catalogue derived from the former SwiftUI app seed data.

channels.name: CPAC Canada
channels.attribution_text: Official CPAC stream endpoint discovered from CPAC metadata.

permission.summary: CPAC terms reviewed on 2026-06-17 prohibit retransmission, embedding, hotlinking, inline linking, scraping, caching, and similar uses without prior written consent.
permission.recommendation: Link to CPAC.ca only unless written consent is obtained.

channels.name: New Zealand Parliament TV
channels.attribution_text: Official Parliament TV HLS candidate; pair with sitting calendar.

permission.summary: Current rights review found an official video portal but did not find explicit native-stream permission in the latest pass.
permission.recommendation: Treat as pending or link-out until terms or written permission are found.

channels.name: Brazil TV Camara
channels.attribution_text: Official TV Camara stream; source attribution and watermark integrity matter.

permission.summary: Camara portal terms appear to allow free reproduction of public information with credit, but TV Camara native HLS expectations still need source-specific confirmation.
permission.recommendation: Keep as promising but confirm native HLS use before presenting it as redistributable.

channels.name: Denmark Folketinget
channels.attribution_text: Official player HLS candidate; terms still need deeper review.

permission.summary: Folketinget rights page supports use and sharing of TV productions subject to conditions including attribution, no modification, and no endorsement.
permission.recommendation: Strong native candidate if license conditions are preserved.

channels.name: Netherlands Tweede Kamer

permission.summary: Official-looking public HLS source, but no sufficient documentary reuse evidence has been recorded.
permission.recommendation: Link-out or pending until terms or permission are documented.

channels.name: Quebec National Assembly - Canal 01

program.current_event_time: Live during sittings or scheduled events

permission.recommendation: Use cautiously and seek written clarification for full live stream reuse.
